prompt: A hyper-realistic 8K cinematic portrait of a uploaded person, captured in a dramatic Chiaroscuro style. The subject is seated at a three-quarter angle, leaning slightly forward with a relaxed yet commanding posture. His face is turned away from the lens, with one side of his face clearly illuminated while the other is completely lost in deep, velvety black shadows. His expression is contemplative, not looking at the camera. The pose is precise: his hands are clasped together near his chest; one hand is held straight with fingers slightly tilted, while the other hand is positioned so only the fingers are visible, resting over the first. He wears a luxury black chronograph watch with a detailed metal link bracelet, a silver ring, and a beaded bracelet. His attire is a sharp black suit jacket over a white dress shirt with the top buttons open, showing refined fabric textures. The background is a solid, seamless black. The lighting is sharp and directional, highlighting the intricate details of his hair, the individual bristles of his beard, the moisture in his eyes, and the glint off the watch face. Cinematic black-and-white color grade with rich contrast and smooth, natural skin transitions. Shot on 85mm lens, f/1.8, high-resolution commercial photography. ar 4:5
